title: Kislevemon
description: This is a Cobblemon addon which comes with currently 19 fakemons, Shiny and non shiny! they can be found in the oceans, deserts and forests.
body:
![KislevemonTitle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23e9e40d197bccd4478664911e9c274f2e78ea1a.png)
## **💡About this addon:**
**Kislevemon** is an addon which aims to add some new fakemons for the mod [cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon). in order to use this addon, make sure to put the file both in the resource pack folder and in the datapacks folder of your world.
## 📩how to install
- before you install the datapack, make sure you have the mod [cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) installed, put the file in **both** the resource pack folder and the datapacks folder of your world
## 🐉Current fakemons:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


this pack currently has 19 fakemons. here is a list of some of them:
 - krechtzen (dragon & poison type)
 - giftaboo (ghost & ice type)
 - sharfire (water & fire type)
 - phantomoir (ghost & steel type)
 - Kangoruk (dark & fighting)
 - Cigrass (poison & grass)
 - Pyromid (fire & ground)
 - Blasticoil (steel & fairy)
 - Smolderail (fire)
 - Coalistrove (fire & rock)
 - Steamilok (fire & steel)
 - Inkthulhu (psychic & fighting)
 - Kislevian Deoxys (steel & dark)
 - Grenoude (Dragon & Fire)
 - Dragomb (Dragon & Fire)
 - Nukon (Dragon & Steel)


</details>


**we also added textures, model and animations for inkay since it's not in the base mod yet**

***more fakemons will come soon!**
